vision.label: Our Vision
vision.quote: "True coffee is the ability to reflect the notes from the bean's nature in their purest form into the cup."
vision.description: ProEspresso is where the finest beans meet scientific methods and modern technology. We roast our harvests, selected from the world's most unique regions, preserving each one's distinct character, and serve them with professional equipment. Our goal is to present coffee not just as a beverage, but as an art form felt in every sip.

espressoBar.title: Espresso Bar
espressoBar.description: The heart of our craft. Scientific precision and quality beans.

milkCoffees.title: Milk Coffees
milkCoffees.description: Silky texture and balanced sweetness. Perfect ratios in every cup.

brewBar.title: Brew Bar
brewBar.description: Alternative methods for coffee connoisseurs. Slow and quality.

franchise.label: Partnership
franchise.description: We're looking for visionary partners who share our passion. ProEspresso offers a profitable and sustainable business model blended with years of roasting experience.
